arts.ttl: Lookman: “The Champions League brings out the best in Atalanta”
arts.sum: Ademola Lookman has reflected on Atalanta’s strong start in the Champions League and their need to improve in Serie A. Speaking with Gianluca Di Marzio, Lookman discussed Atalanta’s recent 3-0 victory over Shakhtar Donetsk and the team’s contrasting performances in domestic and European competitions. Lookman, who scored a hat-trick in last season’s Europa League final against Bayer Leverkusen, securing Atalanta’s first European trophy, expressed his satisfaction with the team’s performance against Shakhtar: “Atalanta played a great game against an excellent Champions League team like Shakhtar. The 3-0 is a great result at the European level, and we are happy both The post Lookman: “The Champions League brings out the best in Atalanta” appeared first on FootItalia.com.
